title: Root help exposes core commands and root flags
description: Black-box smoke for the root Orca CLI help surface.
input: Run `orca --help` and verify the shipped command list plus the root resume/safety flags remain visible.
command: bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; node dist/bin/orca.js --help'
